stemHtml: After take-off the slats (when installed) are always retracted later than the flaps. Why?

options.a: Because V<sub>MCA</sub> with SLATS EXTENDED is more favourable compared with the FLAPS EXTENDED situation.
options.b: Because SLATS EXTENDED gives a large decrease in stall speed with relatively less drag.
options.c: Because SLATS EXTENDED provides a better view from the cockpit than FLAPS EXTENDED.
options.d: Because FLAPS EXTENDED gives a large decrease in stall speed with relatively less drag.
